description: Review code changes introduced within a configurable recent time window, including uncommitted changes, and loop through quality fixes until no high or mid review findings remain.

prompts.divedraPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start at Step 1 review. Step 1 reviews recent committed and uncommitted changes. Step 2 inspects Step 1 and routes to Step 3 when any high or mid finding remains; otherwise route to workflow-output and finish. Step 3 fixes the findings by updating design documents, implementation plans, and implementation code when needed, then route back to Step 1. Finish only after Step 1 has no high or mid findings.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep severity, changed files, commands, design changes, implementation-plan changes, code changes, verification, and routing decisions explicit.

steps.description: Review committed changes from the recent time window plus uncommitted changes.
Exit when Step 1 has no high or mid findings; otherwise send findings to the fixer.
Fix high and mid findings, improving design, implementation plans, and code as needed.
Publish the accepted review summary once no high or mid findings remain.
